name: President Bakery Public Company Limited
summary: President Bakery Public Company Limited manufactures and sells bakery products in Thailand. Its bakery products include sliced and snack breads, filled flavored breads, and readymade sandwiches; burger and hot dog buns; snack cakes; confectionery products; fried products; and fast food and catering products, as well as hamburger buns. The company also provides products based on order placed by restaurants, food stores, and coffee shops. In addition, it retails its products under the Deliya by Farmhouse, Madame Marco cake, Good Morning Farmhouse, Farmhouse Moon Cake, and Farmhouse brand names; and restaurants under the Shinjuku Tonkatsu Saboten name. The company also exports bakery products. President Bakery Public Company Limited was incorporated in 1980 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand. President Bakery Public Company Limited is a subsidiary of Thai President Foods Public Company Limited.
